title: symphyotrichum racemosum var. subdumosum
intro: Symphyotrichum racemosum var. subdumosum, also known as sub-dumos aster or small white panicle aster, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Symphyotrichum racemosum var. subdumosum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
